ABS_PORT.description: Port for the Audiobookshelf web UI + API

ABS_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Audiobookshelf root admin password — auto-generated. ServiceBay calls /init after deploy to skip the first-launch wizard.

ABS_AUDIOBOOKS_PATH.description: Host path to your audiobook library. Defaults to the file-share Samba volume.

ABS_PODCASTS_PATH.description: Host path where Audiobookshelf will download podcast episodes.

ABS_OIDC_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret for Audiobookshelf ↔ Authelia. Auto-generated; surfaced in the install log so you can paste it into ABS Settings → Authentication → OIDC.

NAVIDROME_PORT.description: Port for the Navidrome web UI + Subsonic API

NAVIDROME_ADMIN_USER.description: Navidrome admin username (also used as Subsonic API user)

NAVIDROME_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Navidrome admin password — auto-generated. ServiceBay calls /auth/createAdmin after deploy so first login works without going through the in-app setup.

NAVIDROME_MUSIC_PATH.description: Host path to your music library. Defaults to the file-share template's data dir, so files dropped into the Samba share appear automatically.

NAVIDROME_OIDC_ENABLED.description: Enable Navidrome ↔ Authelia SSO. On by default so family members sign in with the household password. Flip to false if you hit an SSO regression and want to fall back to local Navidrome accounts.

NAVIDROME_OIDC_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret for Navidrome ↔ Authelia. Auto-generated; pinned via clientSecretVar so Authelia and Navidrome share the same value.

PUBLIC_DOMAIN.description: Public domain (used to build the SSO authority URL https://auth.<domain> and the redirect URL).

NAVIDROME_SUBDOMAIN.description: Subdomain for Navidrome (web UI + Symfonium endpoint)
